name: Chicken Crescent Almondine
recipeIngredient: 1 can condensed cream of chicken soup
1 can (8 oz.) water chestnuts, drained and sliced
1 can (4 oz.) mushroom stems and pieces, drained
2/3 cup shredded Swiss or American cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the soup, mayonnaise, sour cream, and onion.
2. Stir in the chicken, water chestnuts, mushrooms, and celery; cook over medium heat until the mixture is hot and bubbly.
3. Pour into an ungreased 13 inch x 9 inch x 2 inch baking dish.
4. Unroll the crescent dough and separate into two rectangles, trimming to fit the dish.
5. Place the dough rectangles over the hot chicken mixture.
6. Combine the cheese and almonds; sprinkle over the dough.
7. Drizzle with butter.
8. Bake at 375 degrees for 20-25 minutes or until the crust is a deep golden brown. Yield: 8 servings.
